exercises.name: Flat Dumbbell Press
instructions: Feet planted, slight arch, shoulder blades pinched back and down
Lower dumbbells to chest level, elbows about 45° from torso
Press up and slightly together without clanking the bells
Control the descent — 2 seconds down

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Overhead Press
instructions: Start with dumbbells at shoulder height, palms forward
Brace abs, don't flare ribs — press straight up
Finish with biceps by ears, don't bang the bells
Lower under control to ear level

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Bench at 30° — steeper turns it into a shoulder press
Lower to upper chest, elbows under wrists
Drive up without shrugging shoulders toward ears

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
instructions: Elbows pinned to sides — they don't move
Push down and spread the rope apart at the bottom
Full lockout, squeeze triceps for a beat
Slow return, don't let the stack yank your arms up

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Grip slightly wider than shoulders, palms forward
Lean back slightly, chest up
Pull the bar to upper chest, elbows driving down and back
Control the way up — full stretch at the top

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit tall, slight bend in knees, back neutral
Pull handle to belly button, squeeze shoulder blades together
Don't rock back and forth — torso stays mostly still
Let arms fully extend on the return without slumping

exercises.name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Knee and hand on bench, back flat like a table
Pull dumbbell to hip, not to armpit
Elbow stays close to body, no torso twist
Full stretch at the bottom each rep

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
instructions: Elbows pinned at sides, shoulders relaxed
Curl up without swinging — if you're rocking, it's too heavy
Squeeze at the top, lower slow (3 seconds)

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold dumbbell vertically against chest, elbows down
Feet shoulder width, toes slightly out
Sit down between your heels — chest stays up
Elbows track inside knees at the bottom, drive up through mid-foot

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Soft knees — this is a hip hinge, not a squat
Push hips back, dumbbells slide down thighs
Stop when hamstrings pull tight (around mid-shin), back flat
Stand up by squeezing glutes, don't yank with lower back

exercises.name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder width, mid-platform
Lower until knees near 90° — don't let lower back curl off the pad
Press through whole foot, don't lock knees hard at the top

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Balls of feet on edge, heels hanging
Full stretch at the bottom — pause there
Drive up as high as possible, hold the top 1 second
Slow tempo beats heavy weight here
